description: Access to the Vault of memories and Admin profile (Identity and History). Includes RAG vector memory for long-term semantic recall.

commands.read_history: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.
commands.remember_info: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.
commands.reset_memory: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.
commands.who_am_i: Ask Hecos to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).
commands.rag_search: Perform a semantic search in the long-term vector memory (RAG knowledge base).
commands.rag_store: Store a piece of information permanently in the vector knowledge base.
commands.rag_ingest_file: Ingest a local file (.txt, .md, .pdf) into the vector knowledge base.

function.name: MEMORY__read_history
function.description: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.

n.description: The number of previous messages to extract (e.g. '10').

function.name: MEMORY__remember_info
function.description: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.

text.description: The detailed information to remember (e.g. 'The user likes coffee').

function.name: MEMORY__reset_memory
function.description: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.

function.name: MEMORY__who_am_i
function.description: Ask Hecos to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).

function.name: MEMORY__rag_search
function.description: Perform a semantic search in the long-term vector memory (RAG). Use when the user asks about past conversations, stored documents, or facts not in the immediate chat context.

query.description: The question or topic to search for in the knowledge base.

function.name: MEMORY__rag_store
function.description: Store a piece of information permanently in the vector knowledge base. Use when the user shares important facts to remember long-term.

text.description: The information to store (e.g. 'My favourite colour is violet').

label.description: A short descriptive label for this memory (e.g. 'colour_preference').

function.name: MEMORY__rag_ingest_file
function.description: Ingest a local file (.txt, .md, .pdf) into the vector knowledge base. Use when the user asks to remember or index a document.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to ingest.
